case_title: G PAUL BOSCHETTI VS. LESLIE CEPILLO et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CEPILLO, LESLIE BONIFACIO, JOSELITO

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCHETTI, G PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CEPILLO, LESLIE BONIFACIO, JOSELITO DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSCHETTI, G PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CEPILLO, LESLIE BONIFACIO, JOSELITO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 355 EDDY ST #401, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
